US Interior Specialties
Sign out Sign in

Careers

Employment application

Complete each hiring task at your own pace. Your progress is saved to your USIS account.

Sign in or create an account

Your hire checklist is saved to your USIS user account so you can finish on any device.

Sign in Create account

Hiring checklist
0 of 4 complete
    Employment application

    Updates your profile name/phone and saves hire intake (no SSN here — collected on I-9).

    Union card

    Take a clear photo of your union membership card. Front is required; back is optional.

    Union dispatch

    Take a photo of your current union dispatch slip or paperwork.

    Form I-9 — Section 1

    Complete USCIS Section 1 in this wizard, review your answers, then sign electronically. Official PDF reference:

    Open I-9 (PDF) USCIS I-9 help
    Review Section 1
    Form W-4 — withholding

    Complete your federal withholding elections in this wizard, review, then sign electronically. Official PDF reference:

    Open Form W-4 (PDF)
    Review Form W-4

    © US Interior Specialties
    Form I-9 — Section 1
    Sign Form I-9 Section 1
    Form W-4
    Sign Form W-4
